name: Emerald Hibiscus
projectTitle: Decision Making Tool for Wildfire Smoke Exposure
description: This tool gives a real-time, data-based recommendation for exertion level when someone is exercising outdoors is suddenly caught in wildfire smoke. It integrates AQI trends, ground-level PM2.5 variability, wind and plume behavior, distance to shelter, exercise-dependent breathing rate, exposure duration, individual sensitivity, and data uncertainty.
